dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace shows full compliance with the governance framework. Both the rules-context-loader and alignment-engine steps executed successfully and passed schema validation, ensuring architectural decisions are grounded in defined rules.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map span generated 5,820 completion tokens, indicating a detailed analysis of architectural evolution. While lower in volume than the baseline, the successful schema validation and logical flow suggest high reasoning quality.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The system successfully transitioned from the alignment-engine (identifying gaps) to the architecture-intent-generator. This sequence confirms that trade-offs were processed and resolved into a final intent document.
